name: Co-Operative
description_short: Member-owned credit union in Coffeyville, KS operating since 1937, offering auto loans, personal loans, mortgages, and credit cards to local members.
description_long:
Cooperative Credit Union (CCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution based in Coffeyville, Kansas, with a documented history dating back to 1937. As a credit union, it operates under the regulatory oversight of the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) and serves its local community as a cooperative financial alternative to traditional banks. The institution emphasizes member ownership and democratic governance, welcoming new members to join and participate in the credit union model.

Cooperative Credit Union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including auto loans (with rates as low as 2.00% APR), personal loans (from 9.90% APR), home loans (from 5.87% APR), and credit cards (from 12.90% APR). The credit union also provides alternative lending products through CUALS (Credit Union Alternative Lending) for emergency cash needs, online banking services, and educational tools like the "My First Nest Egg" app designed to teach children financial literacy. The institution operates a digital banking platform alongside traditional member services.

As a credit union rather than a bank, CCU distinguishes itself through its not-for-profit structure and member-ownership model, where profits theoretically return to members rather than external shareholders. The institution maintains deep community roots in Coffeyville and positions itself as a local alternative to larger commercial banking institutions. The presence of auto loan shopping tools and multiple loan product options indicates a full-service retail credit union operation.

Based on available website information, CCU appears to be a legitimate, established credit union with standard product offerings. However, the website content provided is primarily marketing material with limited detailed information about rates, fees, membership eligibility criteria, or member reviews. As a credit union operating since 1937, it has longevity, but prospective members would need to contact the institution directly for comprehensive terms and conditions.
services: Auto loans (new and used vehicles, motorcycles, RVs, marine, powersports, golf carts)
Vehicle shopping tool ("Find Me Some Wheels")
Youth financial education app ("My First Nest Egg")
pros: Established 1937 — 85+ years of operational history in Coffeyville community
Auto loans as low as 2.00% APR — competitive rates for vehicle financing
Not-for-profit, member-owned structure — profits theoretically benefit members rather than shareholders
Multiple loan products — auto, personal, home, and alternative lending options in one institution
Digital banking platform — online account management and enrollment capabilities
Financial education tool — "My First Nest Egg" app for teaching children money habits
NCUA-insured deposits — member savings accounts protected by federal credit union insurance
cons: Limited geographic availability — appears to primarily serve Coffeyville, KS area with no indication of multi-state branches
Website lacks transparency on membership eligibility criteria and field of membership restrictions
Minimal fee or rate disclosure — specific APRs shown as "as low as" with no details on what qualifies for best rates
No member reviews or testimonials visible on provided website content
Limited information about alternative lending product details — CUALS offering lacks specifics on terms, fees, and eligibility
best_for: Coffeyville, Kansas residents seeking local credit union membership and relationship banking
Borrowers shopping for competitive auto loans in the 2-3% APR range
Families interested in youth financial education tools and member-owned cooperative banking
Local community members prioritizing not-for-profit financial institutions over commercial banks
diagnosis: Cooperative Credit Union is best suited for residents of Coffeyville, Kansas seeking member-owned credit union services with competitive auto lending rates and a local banking relationship. Primary caveat: membership may be geographically limited to the Coffeyville area, and the website provides limited transparency on eligibility requirements, detailed fee structures, and member experience details — direct contact with the institution is necessary for complete product information.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
